title: Confidentiality of collaborative family law communication
doc_html:
§377.15. Confidentiality of collaborative family law communication

            A collaborative family law communication is confidential to the extent agreed by the parties in a signed record or as provided by the laws of this state other than this Part.

            Acts 2024, No. 98, §1.
doc_text:
§377.15.  Confidentiality of collaborative family law communication
A collaborative family law communication is confidential to the extent agreed by the
parties in a signed record or as provided by the laws of this state other than this Part.
Acts 2024, No. 98, §1.
